title: selaginella striata
intro: Selaginella striata, also known as the Striated Spikemoss, is a species of small, evergreen plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella striata include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
